use_for: tools, docs, professional flows, enterprise UI
core_moves: grid, high contrast, whitespace, strong hierarchy, restrained accent
avoid: playful brands, immersive storytelling, decorative portfolios
implementation_checks: clear grid; AAA/AA contrast; no unnecessary decoration; responsive spacing

core_moves: large type, asymmetry, pull quotes, strong rhythm, image/text contrast
avoid: highly dynamic unknown content without constraints
implementation_checks: line length controlled; rhythm across sections; mobile stacking planned

use_for: counterculture, dev tools, bold media, experimental launches
core_moves: stark borders, raw blocks, primary colors, visible structure, heavy type
avoid: conservative industries, critical workflows needing calm
implementation_checks: intentional asymmetry; focus visible; contrast checked; roughness not accidental

use_for: admin, ops, logistics, finance, internal tools
core_moves: dense grids, labels, status colors, exact alignment, compact controls
implementation_checks: scan speed; keyboard efficiency; compact but readable; clear status hierarchy

use_for: premium commerce, hospitality, identity, high-end services
core_moves: restraint, serif/display type, tactile material, slow rhythm, precise spacing
implementation_checks: contrast preserved; imagery quality high; motion restrained; CTA still obvious

use_for: crypto, games, monitoring, agentic systems, technical brands
core_moves: dark layers, signal lines, glow, mono accents, terminal/status language
implementation_checks: neon sparse; readable text; reduced motion; status colors semantic

core_moves: earth palette, soft geometry, texture, breathing space, natural rhythm
implementation_checks: hierarchy not muddy; color contrast checked; texture does not reduce readability

core_moves: rounded volume, pastel contrast, friendly icons, tactile feedback
avoid: serious finance, medical, legal, high-stakes admin
implementation_checks: touch targets large; contrast not pastel-low; bounce not excessive

use_for: premium hero, brand surfaces, visual dashboards
core_moves: translucency, mesh gradients, layered blur, luminous accents
avoid: low-end performance, dense tables, critical text over busy backgrounds
implementation_checks: text contrast; blur fallback; limited layers; background supports content

core_moves: compact cards, tables, filters, sparklines, status hierarchy
implementation_checks: alignment exact; states complete; filters visible; table overflow handled

use_for: MVPs, apps, mobile-friendly flows, cross-platform UI
core_moves: solid colors, no heavy effects, clean icons, quick transitions
implementation_checks: limited palette; fast; focus states; no fake depth

core_moves: scroll reveals, parallax, entrance transitions, microinteractions
implementation_checks: transform/opacity; reduced motion; motion has purpose; no blocking sequences

use_for: public services, healthcare, education, finance, broad audience
core_moves: high contrast, large readable text, keyboard flow, explicit labels, stable layout
implementation_checks: semantic structure; focus ring; contrast; no color-only meaning; reduced motion

core_moves: strong promise, high-contrast CTA, visual proof, above-fold clarity
avoid: complex products needing comparison before action
implementation_checks: one CTA; headline readable; hero media optimized; mobile crop planned

use_for: signup, checkout starts, lead gen, pricing
core_moves: minimal distraction, trust near risk, form clarity, repeated CTA
avoid: exploratory education where pressure hurts trust
implementation_checks: few fields; visible trust; loading/success/error; form mobile-ready

core_moves: credentials, case results, compliance, sober palette, proof close to claims
implementation_checks: claims sourced; security/privacy visible; contrast high; contact path clear

use_for: mission, fundraising, premium brands, founder/product stories
core_moves: chapters, emotional arc, timeline, proof beats, pattern breaks
implementation_checks: one idea per section; skip/scan possible; final CTA resolves story

use_for: ops, IoT, markets, DevOps, live events
core_moves: freshness, connection state, alert severity, streaming charts, recovery actions
implementation_checks: updates stable; stale/offline state; alerts ranked; no distracting redraws
